libjf-translate-v1.jfconfig.libreTransla: The host of LibreTranslate to use if that is selected
libjf-translate-v1.jfconfig.throttleMill:
The numer of milliseconds to wait between translation requests.
This is to prevent spamming the translation service.
libjf-translate-v1.jfconfig.title: LibJF Translate v1
libjf-translate-v1.jfconfig.translationS:
The service to use for translation.
Other mods may access services directly, but this should be used
